app.description: Demonstrates full i18n flow for parser help, errors, and application messages.
opt.locale.desc: Override locale for help, errors, and app text
cmd.doc.long: Render parser documentation in selected format and template
cmd.ini.long: Render INI example or current parser values
opt.doc.mark_hidden.desc: Mark hidden entities in docs output
opt.ini.comment_width.desc: Comment wrapping width for INI example mode
opt.ini.include_defaults.desc: Include default values in INI current mode
opt.ini.include_comments.desc: Include comments in INI current mode
opt.ini.comment_defaults.desc: Comment out defaults in INI current mode
